content.text: Honestly? I keep second-guessing the narrative. We've got strong numbers, the market's there, but every time I sit down to write the story section — the "why us, why now" — it comes out flat. My co-founder thinks it's fine, which means she's either right and I'm overthinking it, or she's being nice and I'm actually right to be worried. I can't tell which. So I end up rewriting it instead of shipping it.
